caption: A group of men wearing grey polo shirts and black trousers walk through a modern building and out into an outdoor area. In the initial scenes, several men walk through a hallway characterized by beige walls and decorative spherical metallic ornaments hanging from the ceiling. One man in the foreground walks forward while another man, wearing a black face mask, follows behind him. The Real Madrid club crest is visible in the upper right corner of the footage. As the sequence progresses, the men move toward an exit, with one man glancing down at a smartphone in his hand. The final scene transitions to an outdoor courtyard featuring light-colored tiling, green hedges, and tall palm trees under a bright sky. The men continue walking forward across the pavement, with one individual wearing a red backpack and a black face mask.
